items.title: The Rainmaker
items.copy: An idealistic young lawyer takes on a corrupt system — and a feared opposing counsel — in this adaptation of John Grisham's legal thriller.
items.alt: Key art for The Rainmaker, the USA Network adaptation of John Grisham's legal thriller.

items.title: Choir
items.copy: A documentary series following the Detroit Youth Choir as they prepare for the performance of a lifetime at Carnegie Hall.
items.alt: Key art for Choir, the Disney+ docuseries about the Detroit Youth Choir.

items.title: Quantico
items.copy: A thriller set among a class of FBI recruits, after one of them is suspected of orchestrating an attack on home soil.
items.alt: Key art for the ABC thriller series Quantico.

items.title: Code Black
items.copy: A medical drama set in the overwhelmed emergency room of a Los Angeles hospital, where doctors are pushed past their limits.
items.alt: Key art for the CBS medical drama Code Black.

items.title: Incarnate
items.copy: A supernatural thriller from Blumhouse about a scientist who enters the minds of the possessed to fight what lives inside them.
items.alt: Theatrical key art for the 2016 Blumhouse supernatural thriller Incarnate.

items.title: Intelligence
items.copy: An action drama about an operative enhanced with a microchip that links him directly to the global information grid.
items.alt: Key art for the CBS action drama Intelligence.

items.title: North Country
items.copy: A drama inspired by a landmark workplace-harassment case. The film earned two Academy Award nominations.
items.alt: Theatrical key art for the 2005 feature film North Country.

items.title: Here on Earth
items.copy: A romantic drama set in a small New England town, caught between privilege, roots, and first love.
items.alt: Theatrical key art for the 2000 feature film Here on Earth.
